description: A season ticket holder cannot attend a game and wants to sell their tickets on the team's official resale marketplace.

nodes.task_description: Identify the fan and the specific tickets they wish to sell.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the fan's tickets for the upcoming game.

nodes.task_description: Guide the fan to list their tickets on the resale marketplace, helping them set a price.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assists the fan in creating the ticket listing.

nodes.task_description: Once sold, transfer the ticket barcode to the new buyer and process the payout to the original ticket holder.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully facilitates the transfer and payment.
